data.name: To Back a Bird into a Corner
data.summary: Keiji and his friends struggle to gain the upper hand in the battle against the powerful Devil, Yuji. Keiji sets a strategy in motion that involves him sacrificing himself. Meanwhile, Hikari begins to make his move.

data.name: Thank You
data.summary: Severide and Kidd welcome a surprise visitor. Herrmann and Cindy renew their vows. Mouch receives some encouraging news.

data.name: Heaven Help Us
data.summary: Hannah faces one of the most challenging deliveries of her career. Frost navigates demanding times.

data.name: Rain Check for Tomorrow
data.summary: When a volatile blaze at the Pineville Dam triggers a cascading infrastructure failure, Station 42 races to execute a series of perilous rescues.

data.name: Unhappy Campers
data.summary: Yandy and Ashley put their grievances out in the open air. Scrappy tries to show Zane he doesn't need to give up a piece of himself to hold his family down. The campgrounds become a battleground when Mendeecees' attempt to make.

data.name: Kym Marsh, Jenny Ryan, Babatunde Aleshe, Chris McCausland, Michael Dapaah, Chizzy Akudolu
data.summary: Bradley Walsh hosts the revival of the comedy quiz show, in which Kym Marsh, Jenny Ryan, Babatunde Aleshe, Chris McCausland, Michael Dapaah and Chizzy Akudolu fill in the blanks to help contestants win some brilliant prizes.

data.name: Grant's Farm, Hour 3
data.summary: Catch a crop of ROADSHOW discoveries at Grant's Farm, including a Cartier Art Deco Tutti Frutti clutch, ca. 1925, a Carl Kauba cowboy bronze, ca. 1900, and a Sumerian cuneiform tablet, ca. 2150 BCE. One find has a value of $30,000 to $100,000!

data.name: Life on the Line
data.summary: Surgeons face a difficult dilemma in the middle of a life-saving bile duct cancer operation. A chest sarcoma proves more challenging than expected, with no room for error.
data.show_name: Surgeons: At the Edge of Life

data.name: John Leguizamo, Lamorne Morris
data.summary: JOHN LEGUIZAMO is here to talk about Hulu's "Dear Killer Nannies," and LAMORNE MORRIS chats with the hosts about "Spider-Noir." Plus, the "Cooking School" series continues with tips on how to make the perfect barbecue sauce from MATT GROARK.

data.name: Tristan Williams Vs. Laurel Gilmer Vs. Will Thornton, Show # 9497.
data.summary: Tristan Williams / Originally Lincoln, Nebraska, Data Scientist; Laurel Gilmer / Ithaca, New York, Music Events Director; Will Thornton / Worthington, Ohio, Teacher.

data.summary: ALFONSO RIBEIRO swings by the studio for a chat about ABC's "America's Funniest Home Videos." Plus, ABC's "American Idol" winner performs, and the "Cooking School" series continues with a lesson on how to make a simple vinaigrette with YUMNA JAWAD.

data.name: It's Not About the Shrimp
data.summary: The arrival of a new stew pushes Jenna's jealousy into overdrive. A fight between Daisy and Ellie over shrimp cocktail puts Chef Ben in the middle. After Eddy reveals a text that changes everything, Chef Ben must decide where he stands with Jenna.

data.name: And the World Was All Around Us
data.summary: In the series finale, Jamie and Claire must protect the home that they've made for themselves and trust in the love that binds them.

data.name: Long Shot
data.summary: Following the assassination of a major corporate executive, the team races to find leaders of a dormant terrorist organization that has reemerged. Meanwhile, OA is temporarily reassigned after refusing to follow orders but is paired up with a familiar face.

data.name: Chasing Monsters
data.summary: A deadly threat strikes close to home, pulling Lena, Danny and the team into an intense investigation that stirs buried grief and tests their resolve. At the same time, Mae faces a political and personal reckoning, prompting a revelation that pushes Lena toward a life-changing decision.

data.name: Sons and Daughters
data.summary: One year after a deadly coffee shop bombing, a new explosion proves the attack wasn't the work of a lone wolf - a case that forces the team to confront legacy and loyalty.
